tasks.task: Identify and finalize track list for the single
tasks.notes: Must happen 4 months in advance to align with distribution schedule

tasks.task: Finalize artwork, including cover art, lyric sheets, and album concept design
tasks.notes: Artwork needs to be approved by label and distributors 3 weeks before release date

tasks.task: Complete digital metadata for The Orchard, including song titles, artist names, and track IDs
tasks.notes: Needs to be completed 1 month in advance of release date

tasks.task: Submit single artwork and metadata files to The Orchard for digital distribution
tasks.notes: Artwork approval process can take up to 2 weeks, so must be submitted early

tasks.task: Develop and distribute pre-release singles for radio airplay and playlist submissions
tasks.notes: Must be submitted 1 month in advance of release date

tasks.task: Create and execute a social media campaign with artist interviews, behind-the-scenes content, and exclusive sneak peeks
tasks.notes: Focus on generating buzz among the target audience for maximum impact

phases.timeline: 2 weeks before release date (day of release)

tasks.task: Coordinate with The Orchard for final distribution setup and activation
tasks.notes: Ensure all digital platforms are live and ready to go by the day of release

tasks.task: Prepare promotional materials such as posters, flyers, and social media graphics for physical releases (if applicable)
tasks.notes: Not required if only digital distribution is planned

tasks.task: Analyze pre-release metrics and adjust marketing strategy for future releases (if applicable)
tasks.notes: Based on data from the current release to optimize upcoming strategies

tasks.task: Send out post-release surveys to collect feedback from listeners/patrons
tasks.notes: Helps gauge listener satisfaction and identify areas for improvement in future releases

critical_path: Finalize track list and artwork by the end of Phase Pre-Production
immediate_actions: Submit all digital metadata to The Orchard no later than 4 weeks before release date
blockers: No known blockers at this time
recommendations: Plan press outreach 2 weeks before release.
Engage fans with exclusive behind-the-scenes content.
